messages.body:
Hey Physique, The Coach Consultant here!

Excited to see you on Monday for the '5 Business Strategies Which Will Decide Who Scales Faster And Earns More In The AI Era' masterclass. I'll also be giving away brand new AI workflow templates to the live attendees, so keep the date and time safe (11am, 19th UK).

Also opened up some 1:1 exclusive discovery calls to go DEEP on your specific setup. If you'd like to grab one of these valuable calls,  check dates and times here https://tinyurl.com/tcc-masterclass

[https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/4pEp1NDve1Vg3Hx08Mmb/media/685aff7c6d0c79488e2033b4.png]

Hey Physique

First of all, welcome and thank you for securing one of the limited spaces on the upcoming "5 Business Strategies Which Will
Decide Who Scales Faster And Earns More In The AI Era" Live Interactive Masterclass

...created for service providers, coaches and consultants who are the spearhead of their business - and want to install the exact
AI-Powered strategies that build trust and gets clients without selling your soul... oh and in 90% less time while 10x your
output.

These are the exact strategies I am using with 100's of my clients to help them catapult into 2026 - consistently.

(NOTE: that ain't a typo - and I'm not talking about one or two 'unicorn clients' we've worked with as an example - we have
literally 100's of coaches who've implemented these strategies and are winning)

On Monday 19th January at 11am we'll be going live for the most direct, no-fluff session you've ever attended.

Straight up problem > solution with the exact strategies you can implement right away. (plus live Q+A where I'll also be giving
away a ton of proven AI workflow templates to all who are there live)

Here's the link to access the live on Zoom on Monday:

>> [Secure My Seat - Open Waiting Room Here on Monday]
[https://us06web.zoom.us/j/89161444809?pwd=QSomDLFPBfD5iTcopJ1PTCP5bthRAV.1]


Just as a heads up Physique, there will be no replay on this. I'm doing this for YOU. I can hold you accountable live...we both
know you're not following the steps on the replay!

🚀 I'll walk you through some of the 5 core problems biz owners face in 2026

🚀 I'll walk you through my complete AI-Powered SmartScaling System

🚀 You'll get a breakdown of the 5 solutions to your growth headaches 

🚀 I'll reveal my company strategies I use with my clients 

🚀 You'll see cutting edge live AI system demos

🚀 You'll discover the specific AI tools for every part of your business

DATES/TIMES

Monday 19th (11am UK)

NOTE: I'm in the UK (with a Yorkshire accent) so it's 11am for me!

One last thing...

In the mean time, if you'd like us to share with you the perfect SmartScaling framework just for your business then opt-in for our
exclusive discovery call below (these are limited so if there's no spaces left I apologise!) 👇

>> [Check Dates & Times]
[https://calendly.com/the-coach-consultant/discovery-call-pa?utm_source=email&utm_me[…]paid&utm_campaign=smartscalingmasterclassv3&utm_content=email1]

If you want a taste of of AI systems and how we use them before booking to speak to us, just check out some YouTube's I have
created recently:

- How to run group intake marketing campaigns: Click here [https://youtu.be/BIGgL42oKos?si=hp8HpZW6HetVV-25]
- Stop using ChatGPT WRONG: Click here [https://youtu.be/ic8jRfpes2I?si=I1SUNMNT_OAU5sxz]
- How to Hijack viral content: Click here [https://youtu.be/kRVHzhSMZPc?si=Mg_DUDZXSrWc2CU-]


Ben

email.subject: There's a smarter way to do this

messages.body:
[https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/4pEp1NDve1Vg3Hx08Mmb/media/685aff7c6d0c79488e2033b4.png]

Hey Tabs,

Right, as promised – here's everything you need to absolutely crush 2026.

Look, I'm not gonna make you wait around. You've shown you're serious about next year, so let's get straight into it.

Here's what you now have access to:

⬇️⬇️ Your 2026 Vision, Growth Strategy & Goal Setting Blueprint ⬇️⬇️

✓ 2026 Vision, Growth Strategy & Goal Setting Blueprint
[https://gamma.app/docs/2026-Vision-Growth-Strategy-Goal-Setting-Blueprint-24ojgey6jxf88yb] – The full guided presentation walking
you through exactly how to map out your entire year with clarity and purpose.

✓ 2026 Blueprint Worksheet [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-5xGsdKwGem47DwjqXKK5gZnxSU0yQ5Lznk4IZdkOgI/edit?tab=t.0] – Your
hands-on worksheet to complete alongside the presentation. This is where the magic happens.

✓ 2026 Timeline Planner
[https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1zP1vtnMQ0-Jy1t324j6Od0Eq3c10cSiS/edit?gid=1973430395#gid=1973430395] – A complete
timeline planning system so you can actually see how your year is gonna unfold and hit every milestone.

✓ 2026 Master KPI Tracking System
[https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Y4ZeedlsC4SbQlPnJ4Vun2bRtxXHd8QmnYTOvW-0IRU/edit?gid=1756656790#gid=1756656790] – A fully
customisable tracking system so you can monitor what's actually working and make decisions based on real data, not guesswork.

Plus Your AI Bonus Stack:

✓ How To X10 Your Output In 90% Less Time [https://info-at-thecoachconsultant.wistia.com/medias/hxy1lwf8gm] – This is the one. If
you're not adopting AI properly in 2026, you're gonna be left behind. This shows you exactly how to integrate it into your
workflow and absolutely multiply your output.

✓ AI KPI Analytics Prompts [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XXpQKJvsMgaecRnwBe4SqLD8v3NNnKCAQM_XTqZKyPM/edit?tab=t.0]–
Ready-to-use prompts that'll help you analyse your KPIs faster and spot opportunities you'd normally miss.

Here's the thing – most people will download this and never actually use it. Don't be that person.

Block out 60-90 minutes this week. Go through the presentation. Complete the worksheet. Map out your timeline. Set up your KPI
tracking.

By the time you've done that, you'll have more clarity on 2026 than most people will have all year. And that clarity? That's what
separates the people who hit their goals from the people who just talk about them.

The AI bonus stack alone is gonna save you hours every single week if you actually implement it. We're talking about working
smarter, not harder – and in 2026, that's non-negotiable.

Any questions as you go through it – just hit reply. I read every single one.

Let's make 2026 the year you look back on and go, "That's when everything changed."

Speak soon.

Ben Hawksworth

P.S. Start with the guided presentation first, then work through the worksheet. That's the order that's gonna get you the best
results. Don't skip ahead – trust the process.
